subcodes.first_line: The Book, revealed by the Wronged One in His Most Great Prison, unto them that have turned towards the Most Exalted Horizon and quaffed the choice wine of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی سجنه الاعظم لمن اقبل الی الافق الاعلی و شرب رحیق العطاء
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
